ops.title: getaway v3 — leg-intent reframe: primitives for creative routing (approved plan)
ops.description: Executing the approved plan at ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/go-look-at-all-resilient-toast.md. Reorients the system per the user's standing intent (41-session transcript sweep): leg-intents replace the closed shape enum (TRIP_TYPES / single-gateway hybrid), every existing stage survives as an à la carte primitive, judgment informs retrieval via scout nodes, constants become plan.tuning defaults, SKILL.md flips from 12-step procedure to primitives catalog ("Invent the shape, then price it"). The five missed-SFO-booking postmortem mechanisms are in scope (P1). Phases: P1 retrieval fixes → P2a downstream generalization (bit-comparable) → P2b atomic cutover → P3 new primitives → P4 prose/doctrine → P5 live regression capstone. Gated on W7 of task 637198b landing first; canonical ask stays servable at every phase boundary.

ops.text: P1 shipped CI-green: sweeps paginate via _paginate with order_by under a page budget; superseded-row disclosure in sweep provenance; mixed-cabin /trips itineraries accepted with per-segment cabins; home-origin shortlist floor, disclosed in truncation
P2a shipped CI-green and bit-comparable vs HEAD on v2 fixtures: fit positional anchoring, stays derive_intervals, per-currency cash axes with W5 adversarial harness re-run green

P2b cutover shipped in one atomic wave: plan.legs replaces trip_type/hybrid/return, compile_graph folds over intents, chain-builder generalizes _compose, walker grammar widened regex-pinned, canonical graphs near-identical, canonical ask exercised pre-ship
P3 shipped: scout node (adds endpoints, never gates), optional-leg variants, plan.tuning overrides, manual-chain pricing primitive, partial-chain leads
P4 shipped: SKILL.md primitives catalog with the canonical walk demoted to one worked example; shape-enum doctrine records superseded in cc-notes; CHANGELOG under [Unreleased]; slop-cop clean

P5 passed: all five regression asks (canonical parity on frozen cache, NRT hybrid, multi-city with two stay intervals, positioning with home-origin-direct variant, SFO postmortem replay through all three fixed layers) plus demo board.webp re-capture
